items.title: Khadakwasla dam water release increased, advisory for Mutha riverbank areas
items.summary: Authorities advised citizens to avoid riverbanks after increased discharge from Khadakwasla dam.

items.title: Water release from Khadakwasla affects Sinhagad Road and low-lying areas
items.summary: River levels may rise near Sinhagad Road, Dhayari and nearby areas.

items.title: Traffic slow near Wakad after road accident on highway stretch
items.summary: A vehicle collision has slowed traffic near Wakad.
